name: Screening recall calibration - SGLT2 inhibitors in heart failure
citation: Illustrative calibration set (clearly on-topic vs off-topic records). Safety bar 0.95 integrated sensitivity per Oami et al. 2025 (Reson Med Sci, PMC12657656). NOT a held-out Cochrane gold set - it measures whether the conservative worklist surfaces true includes into the human review bucket, and reports recall vs the bar.
query: SGLT2 inhibitor heart failure reduced ejection fraction outcomes

records.title: Dapagliflozin in heart failure with reduced ejection fraction
